summary: Materialized a real repo-local clickable Windows shortcut for Narada architect. The shortcut points to Start-NaradaArchitect.ps1, which verifies the crew launch intent sequence and durable launch request before starting Codex in D:\code\narada. Verification read back the .lnk target, arguments, and working directory; no Desktop/Start Menu placement, source Site import, operator-surface runtime copying, or native shell fallback was introduced.
residuals: Shortcut launches Codex but does not claim operator-surface runtime binding/focus proof. Desktop or Start Menu placement remains a separate user-facing convenience admission.
